content:
以下是来自Arlyeon进行的脑缸组专访文字版，我们取得Arlyeon授权后，将会把文本版分成四部分持续发布在《忘却前夜》Discord频道内，完整视频版请点击下方链接前往收看~

The following is the text version of the Brain Vat Group interview conducted by Arlyeon. With Arlyeon's authorization, we will be releasing the text version in four parts on the "Morimens" Discord channel. For the full video version, please click the link below to watch~

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-Vsd5hUMAT8

embeds.title: Surviving Oblivion - Talking Morimens W/ Light & Jiyue Of Brain In ...
embeds.description:
So, after many a year, I finally dipped my toes into #morimens - a #lovecraftianhorror fueled #roguelite #deckbuilder - and in doing so, wound up with a *lot* of questions.

Questions I was fortunately able to get answered, given that their Studio is fairly friendly. So, join me as I find out more a
